description_long: This chaise features a modern, angular design with a prominent, slanted backrest made of a translucent or frosted material, giving it a contemporary and airy appearance. The seat is broad and rectangular, with a smooth, hard surface, and is supported by a combination of solid, block-like legs and a single, angled support on one side. The base structure appears to be constructed from a sturdy, opaque material, possibly metal or high-density plastic, with a matte finish. The chaise includes a small, inset rectangular section on one side of the seat, which may serve as a tray or accent. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of gray, white, and black, with a subtle accent of light brown. The design is minimalist, with no visible upholstery or decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern, angular chaise with a translucent slanted backrest, broad rectangular seat, and minimalist block-like supports in neutral tones.
description_view_0: From this angle, the slanted translucent backrest and the single angled support leg are most prominent, highlighting the chaise's asymmetrical design.
description_view_1: This front view emphasizes the broad seat, the rectangular inset section, and the solid block-like base, with the backrest rising behind.
description_view_2: The side view showcases the full length of the chaise, the thickness of the seat, and the continuous line of the backrest and base.
description_view_3: From the rear, the slanted backrest and the offset support structure are visible, along with the subtle color accent on the seat's edge.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, sharply slanted, and made of a translucent or frosted material, giving it a sleek, modern look. It is a single, unsegmented panel with no visible decorative elements or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs consist of a combination of solid, block-like supports and a single angled leg, all with a smooth, matte finish and a geometric, minimalist style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seat and backrest surfaces are smooth and solid, with no pattern, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating surface is a single, continuous piece with no attached or loose cushions.
